scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm --workspace apps/api run build
scripts.build:web: npm run clean:web && npx prisma generate --schema packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.vercel:build: npm run clean:web && DIRECT_URL=${DIRECT_URL:-$DATABASE_URL} npx prisma generate --schema packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && npm --workspace apps/web run build && find packages/db/generated/client -name '*.node' -exec cp {} apps/web/.next/server/ \;
